programmes.show_description: Patrol officer Malek Badeer stops a car with a dangerous DIY repair job, and patrol man Matt Rugel's routine traffic stop proves unfortunate for a wanted man.
Sergeant Rob Marks hunts down a man with a gun, a novice driver causes a three-car crash and a busy shopping plaza is the scene of a daylight shooting.
A 911 call about stolen gas leads Lieutenant Stacey to the local school, Patrolman Gibson is called to a suspected carjacking, and Officer Rugel finds marijuana.
A group of snowplough drivers and vehicle rescue patrols dedicate themselves, all day every day, to keeping Britain's roads safe when big freezes strike.
Highlights from the series that follows experts who transport huge and unusual loads across the nation. (Ep1)
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
A group of snowplough drivers and vehicle rescue patrols dedicate themselves, all day every day, to keeping Britain's roads safe when big freezes strike.
Storms bring travel chaos to the roads. Inspector Anton is bracing the weather as he attends a major incident where a roof has blown off and collapsed.
A horsebox carries an illegal load, one of the team's top cars becomes a victim of a drink-driver and a road user gets a lesson.
Jason is short of festive cheer when a yuletide party becomes a full-blown riot. Adam and Nick uncover a drunk mother driving her daughter to the shops.
Phil Broughton pulls a young lad in an old Vauxhall that's suspected of being on cloned plates. The biggest surprise of all comes when Phil discovers it's the driver's 15th birthday.
Trouble on the traction line leaves Craig frustrated by endless breakdowns; a driver fights a back injury to keep the trucks moving and a log hauler's crash sparks an all-night rescue.
Police armed with tasers take part in an operation to arrest a man accused of assaulting a pregnant woman, and a car hits 80mph in a 30 zone before crashing.

programmes.show_name: Once Upon A Time In The West
programmes.show_description: Western with Henry Fonda. A mysterious stranger teams up with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow and her land from a ruthless assassin in the employ of a railroad tycoon. (1969)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programmes.show_name: Once Upon A Time In The West
programmes.show_description: Western with Henry Fonda. A mysterious stranger teams up with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow and her land from a ruthless assassin in the employ of a railroad tycoon. (1969)
This episode opens with the hunt for three teens alleged to have threatened a shopkeeper with a gun. The firearms team flood the area.
A driver seems more concerned about losing his footwear than getting nicked! And late night, a PC hunts for a suspected cloned car linked to a recent burglary.
Heavy snow has created avalanche conditions and closed the Coq in both directions. With trucks using back roads, Jamie's team is called out to recover a semi that's gone over a cliff.
The consequences of driving in extreme weather, from a tornado wreaking havoc on a camper van in Arkansas, to a battle royale in Virginia between a flash flood and a hybrid car. (Ep5)
A supernatural killer whom Mulder helped to imprison is released on parole, and a deadly game of cat-and-mouse begins.
Patrol officer Nick Garruto heads off in hot pursuit of car thieves. Patrolman Matt Rugel deals with a driver who's had one too many margaritas.
Carl Andrews takes to the wheel with a gargantuan load, Russell's mobile classroom gets shaken and his engine cooked, and the Ferris's dodge raging bush fires.
Marcus Charman and Trigger patch up an HGV's fuel tank during evening rush hour. Tez resorts to using a blowtorch to fix a car transporter's snapped spring.
On one of the UK's busiest roads, a jackknifed HGV has careered through a front garden, over a ditch and is blocking a lane of traffic.

Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
Scott and Adam discover a huge stash in the boot of a car, and a runaway dealer just misses mowing down Gary.
Scott and Dave track a pair of mobile phone thieves with the help of GPS technology. Nick pushes his motor to the limit as he pursues a criminal gang.
Western starring Edmond O'Brien and Dean Jagger. John Vickers joins Custer's cavalry regiment seeking private revenge. (1951)

Western with Glenn Ford. A town sheriff with a reputation as a legendary gunfighter is called to a showdown with a younger gunslinger and tries to talk him out of the duel. (1967)

Western with Glenn Ford. A town sheriff with a reputation as a legendary gunfighter is called to a showdown with a younger gunslinger and tries to talk him out of the duel. (1967)
An early spring thaw turns roadwork into a muddy mess for Brent and Taylor. Craig clashes with his son-in-law and the boss receives a call that could jeopardise his entire operation.
Being a Traffic Cop isn't just about booking motorists - this episode sees North Yorkshire's finest handling cases of sex offences and people trafficking.
Police follow up reports of a crossbow. Mark pursues the world's worst driver.
Nottinghamshire's finest are back with a bang as the interceptors clash with a runaway driver in one of the most epic police pursuits ever caught on camera.
At Grimsby docks, Sergeant Tom Elvidge pursues teenagers suspected of trying to steal a moped. With no time to wait for backup, a solo Tom chases after them.
...for War. We follow every moment over six gruelling months as a platoon prepares for possible frontline deployment. A Band of Brothers who would lay down their lives for each other.
Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee. A mum calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.
A young girl is the only witness to the death of the detective questioning her. She tells Mulder and Scully that someone else was in the room.
